# TradeX Supply Chain Platform
> Factory-direct product sourcing for Shopify sellers and global buyers.

## Products
- /s/p/{slug}: Individual product pages with specifications, pricing, certifications, and FAQ

## Factories
- /s/f/{slug}: Verified factory profiles with capabilities, certifications, and trust scores

## API
- /api/public/inquiry: Submit sourcing inquiries (POST, JSON)

## About
TradeX connects verified Chinese manufacturers with overseas Shopify sellers through a semi-managed B2B supply chain. All factories are verified with trust scores based on actual delivery performance.
